title: senecillis duciformis
intro: Senecillis duciformis, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family with a long history of medicinal use. It contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Groundsel include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as a digestive aid to relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Groundsel can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
